responsibilities: Design and program PLC-based control logic to automate manufacturing processes and industrial equipment operations
Develop and configure SCADA and HMI systems to provide real-time monitoring and control of automated production lines
Integrate sensors, actuators, and industrial robots into automated work cells to optimize throughput and reduce manual labor
Troubleshoot and debug PLC programs, electrical circuits, and industrial network communication issues to minimize production downtime
Configure and commission industrial networking protocols such as EtherCAT, Profinet, and Modbus for device-to-device communication
Collaborate with mechanical and process engineers to design automated workflows that improve manufacturing efficiency and quality
Conduct factory acceptance testing and site commissioning to validate automated system performance before production rollout
Implement predictive maintenance strategies using sensor data analytics to reduce unplanned equipment downtime
Document control system architecture, wiring diagrams, and standard operating procedures for automated production systems
